



a [[Country_Club|Disorient COUNTRY CLUB]] event<BR>
[[Image:CCWebsiteSplash_2026_v006.png|550px]] [[Image:20260121.CCXiVVexillum.png|205px]] 
==OVERVIEW==
Join Disorient for year 14 of our annual journey of deep chilling, off-the-grid futurist relaxation. Country Club is a
lake and lush green woodland oasis where blissful self-reliance meets massive multiplayer techno and technology
participation. We invite you to roam the wild forest adventuring in constantly shifting blank canvas of music, art, and
performance. Country Club is an event organized by an all volunteer team.

<P>

Disorient presents: COUNTRY CLUB XIV - Presence and the Eternal Now<BR>
Thu, May 21, NOON to Mon, May 25, NOON 2026 <BR>
Secret Location Upstate<BR>
Location released to ticket holders week of the event<BR>

==2026 THEME==
Disorient Country Club 2026 Theme: Presence and the Eternal Now<BR>
An orderly return to chaos. A found frequency where previously there was static. Returning to consciousness by
following that sweet distant melody... we realize only the current moment ever existed. Fully awake, now contemplating
the texture of silence, our aetherial energy source. Just for this one time, and every time we gather together, our
thoughts were, will be, and are the river of intention.

<BR>

==OUR ART + YOUR ART==
We invite you to bring your magic to plug it into the vortex. Disorient Country Club is an ephemeral dream that exists for one weekend only. Together we ride the spiral of this continually morphing long weekend of art, theme camps, art cars, art boats, and electronic and live music.
 
[https://disorientcountry.club/get-involved Get involved and register] art you'd like to bring!
<BR>

==TICKETS==

TICKETS: https://events.humanitix.com/disorient-presents-country-club-xiv-presence-and-the-eternal-now<BR>

VOLUNTEER: https://tinyurl.com/4xwyzby7<BR>
SUBMIT ART: https://tinyurl.com/yc8ptjud<BR>
THEMECAMPS PLACEMENT REQUEST: https://tinyurl.com/37u7hmr6<BR>
SUBMIT EVENT OR WORKSHOP TO SURVIVAL GUIDE: https://tinyurl.com/36vjnzer<BR>
ART CAR SUBMISSION: https://tinyurl.com/yc8ptjud<BR>

SURVIVAL GUIDE: https://disorientcountry.club<BR>
DISORIENT WIKI: http://wiki.disorient.info/index.php?title=Country_Club<BR>
FACEBOOK: https://www.facebook.com/share/1Dw438Ak6c



==THEME CAMPS==

===0 BPM===
0 BPM returns! Featuring drone and experimental improvisation performances Saturday and Sunday.

===Banya===
Comrade! Come to our Beloved Banya, and let the Heat bring you into the Present. Sweat it out until only THIS moment exists... and then...
Emerge and step into our ex-Soviet Dreamscape where the vodka flows, the Eastern European beers are cold, and the snacks are salty and aggressively Slavic.
Dress loud (velour track suits &amp; animal prints highly encouraged). We will toast, drink, snack and do much spy activity on fellow neighbor.
Bring your bathing suit, or not!...and sweat yourself into the NOW!
Remember Rule #1: doo naut dye! Dreenk vatar yuu eediot!
A night of post-Soviet freedom and debauchery—full of love, energy, badly good decisions, and just the right amount of chaos. Let us squat.
Na zdorovya!


===Boogie Down Lounge===
The &quot;BOOGIE DOWN LOUNGE&quot; is back!!
We've all been there. Feeling overwhelmed, needing a place to re-center, a place to take a breath from the festivities. WE welcome you to take that breath at the Boogie Down Lounge. Enjoy some cucumber water or some hot chai while listening to soothing melodic international inspired music. We are a bedouin-inspired chill space experience. Entering through the draped portal, you will be transported into a calming retreat, a transcendental realm that reconnects mind body and spirit.
Snuggled in the woods, find comfort with so soft pillows, cozy blankets, wafting aromas and soft lights. Find your inner zen or just a brief respite before jumping back into the party. As your hosts, we welcome you to join us.
We kindly ask you to remove your shows before entering, be mindful of other guests and whisper, leave no trace and adults only please.


===Camp Boozehole===
Welcome to Camp Boozehole YA'LL!
This year we present you with the BOOZEHOLE SALOON!
Come on by for a ye olde rootin' tootin' raucously boozy grand old timey!! Serving you hooch (and wild west vibes) all weekend long.
Bring your A game to GET THE BOOT! and we'll be happy to kick you out of our watering hole with a thematic toss through the saloon doors!! (seriously … we want to throw your a** out)


===Camp Campfire!===
Camp Campfire!
We serve up sweet AND savory smores! We will also have a SCOUT PARADE where we dress in scout gear and hand out merit badges and possible gift rubber chickens.


===Camp Utopianist Project===
Saturday night will be liquid funk showcase with Arrow Chrome.  We will also have other DJs, our friend Jon does a great UK garage set and my other buddy Al will do nu-reggae and dance hall.  On Friday night I will do a happy house set.  We will also do a workshop on the Utopianist Project ([https://utopianistproject.org/ https://utopianistproject.org/]) We will also have a massage table and offer 6-handed massages and have games such as chess and corn-hole.

===Digital Native===
By day, chill vibes, shade, coffee, and live performances. Parties and cozy campfires at night except for Sunday where the party is at brunch. We have a stage featuring a curated lineup of DJs who are also our friends. This year we are debuting a new handmade custom Function None™ sound system for your dancing pleasure and have a new synchronized LED installation for your looking at pleasure. Check our sign out front daily for DJ set times.

===Lizard Lounge===
Where the after hours meets the living room. Come bop ya head to the beat. Make a friend, leave with a few new favorite songs.

===Synarchy Boombox===
A Giant… BOOMBOX?! (Yes. Obviously.)  Behold the SYNARCHY BOOMBOX— a gloriously oversized relic of rhythm, scaled up to 16 feet wide, 8 feet tall, and fully committed to the bit.  This is not a sculpture pretending to be a boombox. This is a boombox that ate a sculpture and kept growing.  Step inside and you’ll find yourself inside the music; sound ricocheting through the chamber, bass wrapping around your ribs, light dancing like it knows something you don’t. It’s part instrument, part environment, part friendly sonic creature.  Step outside and she is projecting waves of sound and color reminding you that you are a star.   Now… let’s make it misbehave   With big, beautiful, irresistible, functional….. knobs.  No instructions. No right answers. Just curiosity and consequence.  This is not a passive listening experience. This is a playable moment.  A place where strangers become collaborators.  where sound becomes something you can touch.  and where a giant boombox invites you to ask:  What happens if I turn this?  Go ahead. It’s begging for it.

===This Must Be the Place===
A portal disguised as a camp, nestled between the ordinary and the magical. We’re a crew of dreamers, dancers, builders, and late-night philosophers who’ve come together to create a cozy, vibrant haven at the Country Club. Our camp is about grounding in the now—through connection, joy, and just the right amount of weird.
By day, find shade, chill beats, massage stations and restorative elixirs at our shady chill space, where strangers become family. When night falls… well, that’s when the magic really starts. Expect spontaneous dance parties, storytelling under the stars, and interactive art installations that ask the big questions (and answer them with glitter).
We’re fully fueled by love, intention, and sensation. Whether you're stopping by for a moment or moving in for a while—if you feel it, then yes... This Must Be The Place.

===Wizzard's on the Playa===
Will offer pornjy lounge vibes with BassBoss sound. Bar and treats will be spontaneously served




Our event takes place near Shandaken, NY, 2 ½ hours north of NYC. We will release the exact location the week of the event.
<strong>Transportation Options:</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>DRIVING</strong>: 2 ½ hours north of NYC. Exact location released week of 5/21.</li>
<li><strong>FLYING</strong>: We recommend flying into Newark-EWR and renting a car from the airport. For this option expect 2 ½ hours of drivetime up. Alternatively, fly into Albany-ALB with a 1 ½ hour drive to gate.</li>
<li><strong>UBER/LYFT/ETC</strong>: People have done it, prices vary</li>
<li><strong>RIDESHARE FROM NYC</strong>: Check the [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-loCO326kkTCRD_dok8ZOR5EhRYji_IZDiRfa69sHHY/edit?gid=0#gid=0 Rideshare board] and the FB event page</li>
<li><strong>BUS</strong>: Take the Trailways bus to Phoenicia and arrange a friend onsite to scoop you up. Phoenicia Trailways Bus stop is 10 mins away from our gate. Tell the driver your stop is Shandaken. [https://webstore.trailways.com/ https://webstore.trailways.com/]</li>
<li><strong>TRAIN</strong>: AMTRAK to Rhinecliff Stop ID: RHIN. Closest stop is 50 minutes away from our gate. You must arrange a ride from Rhinecliff.</li>
<li><strong>TOWN CAR SERVICE</strong>: Woodstock Town Car [http://woodstocktowncar.com woodstocktowncar.com] (845) 679-6656 Cars, Limos Passenger Vans, service from NYC and Surrounding areas directly to our gate.</li>
<li><strong>SMALL PLANES/HELICOPTER</strong>: Hunter Mountain Airport, ICAO: 97NY, 26 minutes from gate</li>
</ul>


==GENERAL INFO==
* There is no vending at Country Club, and no vending is allowed. Bring everything you need for survival and well-being including shade, food and water. There are no showers on site, feel free to bring your solar shower.<BR>
* You may bring your pets but please be mindful of them, as there are coyotes in the area. Most of the camping site is in the woods.<BR>
* Country Club is minimally RV friendly. Limited number of RV passes available. The site does not offer RV hookups.<BR>
* This is a LEAVE NO TRACE event. This means, leave the place you visit the same or better than you found it. Bring trash bags, and take your trash with you when you leave.<BR>
* All children will require a ticket.<BR>
* Disorient is a volunteer-run art collective.<BR>
* Disorient has very few rules, but two require declaration and elaboration:<BR>
* 1. Respect personal boundaries.<BR>
* 2. Take responsibility for your own experience.<BR>
* The interplay of these two rules forms a social contract that makes our events safe places to explore your own boundaries while encouraging respect for each other. Talk to those around you about anything that makes you uncomfortable.<BR>




==MOODS==
<gallery heights=200 mode="packed-hover">
Image:CCWebsiteSplash_2026_v006.png
</gallery>

==T-SHIRT==
[[Image:CCXiVTshirt.png|240px]]

==ESCUTCHEON==
[[Image:20260121.CCXiVVexillum.png|250px]] <BR>



a [[Country_Club|Disorient COUNTRY CLUB]] event<BR>
